description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a combination of white and horizontally-striped wood-textured exterior panels. Large, vertically-oriented windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The structure consists of two main stories, with several cantilevered sections creating visual interest and additional covered space below. The flat roof and clean lines emphasize a minimalist aesthetic, while the open lower section could serve as a carport or patio. The main entryway is recessed and partially sheltered, with a simple door and no visible decorative elements. The overall appearance is sleek, contemporary, and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large vertical windows, and a mix of white and wood-textured exterior panels. The design features cantilevered sections and a minimalist, urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large vertical windows, and a covered lower section with wood-textured panels.
description_view_1: Top-down rear view highlighting the flat roofs, upper-level rooms, and the horizontal wood-textured siding.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the cantilevered upper story, multiple large windows, and the open lower section.
description_view_3: Rear view with asymmetrical window placement, flat roof, and a prominent cantilevered section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed, simple entryway with a flat overhang and no decorative elements
